name: David Bowie

acts.description: Multiple accounts of sexual encounters with underage groupies Lori Maddox and others in the early 1970s

behavior_summary: Lori Maddox and other sources describe sexual encounters with Bowie when they were 13-15 years old. He was in his mid-twenties and an international superstar. He died in 2016 before full reckoning.

art.summary: One of the greatest artists in rock history. Constant reinvention, enormous influence on music, fashion, and gender expression.

verdict.blurb: Ziggy Stardust. Heroes. Died beloved by the entire world. Also, according to multiple first-hand accounts, had sex with girls as young as 13. The grief and the accounting have yet to coexist.
